serverInfo.name: mcp-scorecard
serverInfo.title: mcp-scorecard — agent-readiness scorecard for MCP servers
serverInfo.description: Probes any MCP server over stdio, runs 10 agent-readiness checks, outputs a 0–100 score with actionable fixes. Local-first, no credentials.

tools.name: audit
tools.description: Audit an MCP server (npm package, GitHub URL, or local dist) and return a 0–100 agent-readiness score with 10 itemized checks and fixes.
